title: Bodhicharyavatara: The Way of the Bodhisattva
description: Shantideva's masterwork on compassion: the aspiration to attain enlightenment for the sake of all sentient beings.
introduction: Shantideva's masterwork on compassion: the aspiration to attain enlightenment for the sake of all sentient beings.

translation.original_text: yāvad ākāśam avatișṭhate yāvac ca jīvasattvadhātuḥ | tāvad aham avatișṭheyaṃ lokaduḥkhavyapohane
translation.text: As long as space endures, as long as sentient beings remain, may I too remain to dispel the suffering of the world.
